memory.summary: My plan to finish the assignment first is already crumbling because my friends are inviting me for lunch right now. I feel torn between pushing through my work or just joining them immediately.

desires: Join the lunch with cohort_3 immediately so I don't feel like a jerk for ignoring them again.
Finish this analysis section by 18:00 so my teammates don't think I'm flaking on the group project.
Just get through today without another late night; I'm already running on fumes.

goals.description: Go eat lunch with cohort_3 right now before I completely lose my social standing.
goals.rationale: Relationships are 50% of my value system; ignoring them again feels like a personal failure. The soft deadline on the assignment means I can squeeze it in later, but my social anxiety is spiking.

goals.description: Finish the analysis section by 18:00 so teammates don't think I'm flaking.
goals.rationale: Assertiveness demands I protect my reputation with the team, but my impulsive nature and sleep debt make deep focus impossible right now. I'll tackle this immediately after lunch to clear the guilt.

goals.description: Get through today without another late night.
goals.rationale: I know I'm running on fumes (sleep discipline is only 3/10), but fixing that requires long-term planning which I hate. Right now, just surviving the day feels like enough growth.

agent.last_reasoning: Relationships are 50% of my value; ignoring them feels like failure. I'll eat now to secure my standing, then tackle the analysis later when guilt drives me.
